channel.title: Beginner on Coffee time
channel.description: Recent content in Beginner on Coffee time

item.title: Let’s make a simple todo app with Go
item.description: Generally Go is perfect for building micro services, but it doesn’t mean that trivial MVC app are not easy to build. Go has built-in support for parsing html template, though we are not going to focus on that. First of all let’s write our go code for serving a html page and save it in a directory. In our case let’s call the directory todoapp and create a home.tpl file inside it.
